sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (
select --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.FirstName
,ap.LastName
,ap.MiddleName
,ap.ClientId
,ap.DateOfBirth
,ap.GenderId
,ap.Street1
,ap.City
,ap.StateId
,ap.Zip
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.EndDate
,ap.Town
,ap.CountryId
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
						inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.CreatedBy    )
						--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
						inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_hcPropagatingChildProfile t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.* 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap		
inner join hcstafftitle hs on (hs.id=hcStaffTitleId )
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hs.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_hcPropagatingStaffMember t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeId
,ap.hcStaffCertificationLUId
,ap.ContractRate
,ap.IsPrimary
,ap.Modifier1
,ap.Modifier2
,ap.Modifier2Name
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.hcStaffCredentialId
,ap.Modifier3
,ap.Modifier4
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join  dbo.hcProviderBillingCode bc on ( ap.hcProviderBillingCodeId=bc.id   )
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=bc.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcProviderBillingCodeCredentials t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.hcFunderId
,ap.hcProviderServiceId
,ap.billingCode
,ap.[description]
,ap.hcUnitTypeId
,ap.hcFrequencyTypeId
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.Rate
,ap.Modifier
,ap.billingCode2
,ap.hcUnitTypeId2
,ap.Rate2
,ap.Duration
,ap.DurationTypeId
,ap.Combined
,ap.BillingCodeTemplateId
,ap.hcServiceId
,ap.restrictStaffProviderToService
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeRateTypeId
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeRoundingTypeId
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeRoundingTypeId2
,ap.PropagatingEndDate
,ap.Inactive
,ap.NoAuthRequired
,ap.RenderingProviderTypeId
,ap.RenderingProviderStaffId
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.SendAccountNPI
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcProviderBillingCode t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select distinct
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.phone
,ap.email
,ap.website
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.AddressId
,ap.isMainLocation
,ap.fax
,ap.isBillingLocation
,ap.agencyName
,ap.federalTaxId
,ap.npiNumber
,ap.TaxonomyCode
,ap.effectiveDate
,ap.providerCommercialNumber
,ap.stateLicenseNumber
,ap.locationNumber
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
inner join Subscription s on (a.ID=s.accountInfoID)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcProviderLocation t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select-- ap.* --count(*)
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.isActive
,ap.[description]
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.isDPH
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
 inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
inner join Subscription s on (a.ID=s.accountInfoID)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcProviderServiceLine t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

ap.Name,
ap.BaseRate,
ap.IsActive,
ap.CreatedBy,
ap.DateCreated,
ap.ModifiedBy,

 inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )

)t1

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.ID
,ap.ReportId
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.CreatedDate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1

select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (SELECT [id]
      ,[roleId]
      ,[hcPermissionsAccessLevelId]
      ,[DateCreated]
      ,[DateLastModified]
      ,[DateDeleted]
      ,[hcPermissionsLevelTypeId]
      ,[ModifiedBy]
      ,[DeletedBy]
      ,[CreatedBy]
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
WHERE ap.roleid IN (SELECT roletypeid 
FROM hcstafftitle s inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (s.accountInfoId=a.ID ) 
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
)t1
left join Temp_hcRolePermissions t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hcFunderId
,ap.hcProviderServiceId
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.IsActive
,ap.hcServiceNPIBillingTypeId
,ap.staffProviderId
,ap.hcBillingSubmissionMethodId
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.hcBillingProviderOptionId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcFunder hf on ( ap.hcFunderid =hf.id) 	
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcServiceFunder t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.TypeId
,ap.MemberId
,ap.[Name]
,ap.Settings
,ap.IsDefault
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated

inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

,ap.[name]
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted

)t1

select t1.* from (
select h.*
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} h 
inner join accountinfo a on (h.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffCredential t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select-- ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.OptionId
,ap.StaffMemberId
,ap.Selected
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 		
inner join hcstaffmember m on m.id = ap.staffmemberid
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =m.tblmemberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (p.memberId=ap.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffCustomFieldOptionValues t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.[Name]
,ap.[Value]
,ap.StaffCustomFieldEntityId
,ap.StaffMemberId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
 inner join hcstaffmember m on m.id = ap.staffmemberid
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =m.tblmemberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (p.memberId=tm.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffCustomFieldValues t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
Where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.[Value]
,ap.StaffCustomFieldId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join dbo.hcStaffCustomFields cf on ( ap.StaffCustomFieldId=cf.id   ) 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=cf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffCustomFieldsOptions t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select -- h.* 
h.id
,h.AgeGroupLUId
,h.tblMembeRId
,h.CreatedBy
,h.ModifiedBy
,h.DateCreated
,h.DateLastModified
,h.DateDeleted

)t1

select t1.* from (select  ap.id
,ap.tblMemberId
,ap.hcStaffCredentialId
,ap.issueDate
,ap.expiredDate
,ap.certificationNumber
,ap.notes
,ap.attachment
,ap.attachmentFileName
,ap.hideWarning

,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ExpiringTaskAddedOn
,ap.ExpiredTaskAddedOn

inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.tblmemberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
